title: Set of 6 - It's a Girl Gender Reveal Scratch Cards - Fun Baby Gender Reveal Games for Party - Surprise Boy or Girl Tickets - Exciting Baby Shower Games - Includes Six Cards
features: BABY REVEAL IDEAS: These Its a Boy gender reveal scratch cards are perfect for adding excitement to your baby shower games, making them a must-have gender reveal decoration for your baby reveal party.
GENDER REVEAL IDEAS FOR FAMILY: Surprise your guests with these fun gender reveal scratch cards, a unique addition to your baby gender reveal decorations and a delightful gender reveal gift.
GENDER REVEAL GIFTS FOR PARENTS: Enhance your gender reveal party with these scratch cards, offering a creative twist to traditional gender reveal ideas and complementing your gender reveal backdrop.
GENDER REVEAL CARDS: These gender reveal scratch cards are an exciting way to reveal the baby's gender, pairing perfectly with gender reveal balloons and other baby gender reveal ideas.
GENDER REVEAL GIFTS: Add a touch of mystery to your baby shower with these gender reveal scratch cards, a fantastic choice for gender reveal games and boy or girl decorations.
